texto: A covenant is a bond in blood sovereignly administered. When God enters into a covenantal relationship with men, he sovereignly institutes a life-and-death bond. A covenant is a bond in blood, or a bond of life and death, sovereignly administered.
explicacao: Citação de O. Palmer Robertson sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A covenant is a bond in blood sovereignly administered.
